subject: Faculty of 1000 Biology: Immediate Access
body:
Dear Colleague,
 
Start exploring Faculty of 1000 Biology for free! www.f1000biology.com/home

As a previous registrant of Faculty of 1000 Biology, we have good news for you
- our selection of the most important papers in biology is now free to browse
and search.

Visit your topics of interest to see which papers our global faculty of over
2400 top scientists recommend, who selected them and how highly they are rated.
www.f1000biology.com/browse

You will still need a subscription to read the Faculty's comments on each
paper, as your institution has yet to subscribe, but you can sign-up for a free
3-week trial. www.f1000biology.com/about/trial

----------------------------------------
"My only regret is that I didn't discover this website sooner!"
Claire Tseng, Harvard University, USA
----------------------------------------

Please forward this email to your friends and colleagues to let them know they
can use Faculty of 1000 Biology www.f1000biology.com/home and Faculty of 1000
Medicine www.f1000medicine.com/home (which is now also free to explore) to save
precious time and keep up-to-date with the essential advances.

Kind regards,

Dave Weedon
Managing Director
Faculty of 1000 Biology
 
----------------------------------------

You have received this message because you asked to receive updates from
Faculty of 1000 Biology.
Your registered email address is: jeeproject@yahoo.com
To unsubscribe send a blank email to: leave-2326242-100446683.6b811bde804de2323cb17b25bf5a9910@news.biomedcentral.com 
For further information or enquiries please contact Customer Services at:
info@f1000biology.com

----------------------------------------

F1000 Biology, Biology Reports Ltd
Science Navigation Group, Middlesex House, 34-42 Cleveland Street, London, W1T
4LB, United Kingdom
body_html:
Dear Colleague,

Start exploring Faculty of 1000 Biology for free!

As a previous registrant of Faculty of 1000 Biology, we have good news for you - our selection of the most important papers in biology is now free to browse and search.

Visit your topics of interest to see which papers our global faculty of over 2400 top scientists recommend, who selected them and how highly they are rated.

You will still need a subscription to read the Faculty's comments on each paper, as your institution has yet to subscribe, but you can sign-up for a free 3-week trial.		  
"My only regret is that I didn't discover this website sooner!"
Claire Tseng, Harvard University, USA

Please forward this email to your friends and colleagues to let them know they can use Faculty of 1000 Biology and Faculty of 1000 Medicine (which is now also free to explore) to save precious time and keep up-to-date with the essential advances.

Kind regards,

Dave Weedon
Managing Director
Faculty of 1000 Biology
